case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. vs. WILLIAMS, LASHAWN

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, LASHAWN $1,571.25 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,651.25

RETURNED OF WRIT OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY JUDGMENT, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF $966.00, ISSUED ON SEP-11-2004 TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY SHERIFF; FULL SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT HAS BEEN FILED BY THE PLAINTIFF ON JUL-14-2003
